parameters.subject: =Meeting Summary - {{$now.format('dd LLL yyyy HH:mm')}}

json.meeting_text: Weekly product strategy meeting conducted for the CollegeNav AI platform. Priya will design the new student dashboard UI by Tuesday. Karthik is responsible for integrating the chatbot with the admission recommendation engine by Friday. Meena will prepare social media marketing content and promotional posters before the product launch. The team finalized Firebase for authentication and decided to use Gemini API for career guidance recommendations. Management requested faster response times and improved mobile optimization for low-end devices. The team agreed to complete beta testing within the next 10 days and schedule a demo presentation for stakeholders next week. Overall meeting sentiment was highly positive and collaborative.
